foundations.label: Execution Runtime
foundations.description: Policy, validation, retry, timeout, hooks, metrics.

foundations.label: Action Provider
foundations.description: Action registry plus tool manifest export.

foundations.label: GOAT Token Registry
foundations.description: Symbol-to-address resolution for GOAT chain assets.

workflows.title: Smart Ring Checkout
workflows.judgePitch: 把智能戒指预购从页面按钮升级成 AgentKit 可编排的支付状态机。
workflows.businessUse: 适合预购、健康订阅月费、升级报告解锁。
workflows.currentMvp: 页面已具备 GOAT Testnet3 钱包连接、订单生成、签名授权和支付入口。
workflows.nextStep: 把真实 merchant gateway 接入 `goat.x402.payment.create`、`submitSignature`、`status`。
userSees: 用户看到智能戒指预购单、签名授权和支付状态更新的完整路径。
评委看到的不只是支付按钮，而是可追踪的 x402 intent -> sign -> settle 流程。

actions.name: wallet.resolve_token
actions.description: Resolve a token symbol to its on-chain contract address

actions.name: wallet.balance
actions.description: Query wallet balance (native token when tokenAddress absent, ERC20 otherwise)

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.create
actions.description: Create x402 payment intent via merchant gateway API

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.submitSignature
actions.description: Submit payer signature to merchant gateway (supports EIP-712 signing)

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.transfer
actions.description: Execute payer wallet token transfer to merchant payToAddress

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.status
actions.description: Get x402 payment status via merchant gateway API

workflows.title: Merchant Ops Loop
workflows.judgePitch: 把 demo 从一次性付款页扩展成可运营的订阅业务后台能力。
workflows.businessUse: 适合订单追踪、营收看板、webhook 开通和收款地址管理。
workflows.currentMvp: 页面已展示订单列表，本地可保存演示订单。
workflows.nextStep: 把订单状态、dashboard 和 webhook 能力接入真实 merchant portal API。
userSees: 团队可以解释订单怎么从支付成功流向订阅开通和发货。
评委能快速理解我们已经考虑了 merchant 运营，不是只有交易瞬间。

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.dashboard.stats
actions.description: Get merchant dashboard statistics (revenue, order counts, recent orders)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.orders.list
actions.description: List x402 merchant orders with optional filters (status, flow, chain, date range)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.webhooks.create
actions.description: Create a new webhook endpoint (owner only). Save the webhook secret from response!

workflows.title: Health Agent Trust Layer
workflows.judgePitch: 把健康建议服务注册成可追踪、可积累信誉的链上 agent。
workflows.businessUse: 适合把分析 agent 版本、方法论和服务信誉沉淀为长期资产。
workflows.currentMvp: 页面已讲清 agent 身份层的产品方向，但还没有真实上链注册。
workflows.nextStep: 把 `VitalScope Health Agent` 注册到测试网，并用标签化反馈积累信誉。
userSees: 用户未来可以看到分析 agent 的版本说明、适用范围和信誉标签。
评委会看到我们把健康建议解释成 agent service，而不是普通内容页。

actions.name: erc8004.register_agent
actions.description: Register a new agent in the ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Returns the transaction hash. The agentURI should point to a JSON registration file describing the agent.

actions.name: erc8004.set_agent_uri
actions.description: Update the registration URI for an agent in the ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Only the agent owner can call this.

actions.name: erc8004.set_metadata
actions.description: Set a metadata entry for an agent in the ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Only the agent owner can call this.

actions.name: erc8004.give_feedback
actions.description: Submit feedback for an agent in the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry. Value is a signed integer with decimals (e.g. value=87, decimals=0 for a score of 87; value=9977, decimals=2 for 99.77%).

actions.name: erc8004.get_reputation
actions.description: Get the reputation summary for an agent from the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry. Filter by client addresses and tags. Pass empty arrays/strings for no filter.
